calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:evandra Patel, plaintiff in pro per; Duran Ruiz, defendant in pro per.

The parties placed a stipulation for judgment on the record as follows: possession and restitution to the plaintiff. Defendant will vacate the premises located at 55 3oth Street #33, San Francisco, California on or before August 25, 2004. Defendant will empty premises of all her possessions; any personal property left behind is to be deemed of no value and abandoned by defendant,and plaintiff may dispose of same without notice to defendant; defendant waives any right to auction sale of the abandoned personal property she may have under the Civil Code. If defendant makes timely surrender of the premises, plaintiff shall at the time of surrender of possession and the keys to the premises pay to defendant the sum of $1400.00 for relocation expenses, and waive back rent of $5600.00. The parties further stipulate to a release of all claims, known or unknown, waiving any right to the contrary in Civil Code section 1542.

If defendant fails to surrender possession on a timely basis, plaintiff may obtain judgment and issuance of a writ for possession, and defendant waives the right to payment of consideration for surrender by the agreed date, as well as the waiver of back rent by plaintiff.

A written agreement embodying the terms of the settlement shall be prepared by plaintiff, and both parties agree to execute same.

Both parties agree on the record to the terms of the settlement agreement and agree to the terms set forth on the record.

The trial date is vacated.
Judge Pro Tem Steven Taxman; Clerk Craig Blackstone; Reporter Christina Paxton (D. 206)
